description.en: Finish the compression process, returning a bytes object containing any data stored in the compressor’s internal buffers. The compressor cannot be used after this method has been called.

excerpt.es: Finish the compression process, returning a bytes object containing any data stored in the compressor’s internal buffers. The compressor cannot be used after this method has been called.
